name: Toggle
description: Boolean slide toggle with role="switch" accessibility.

name: Entity Chip
description: Inline chip for actors, projects, and vault items.

name: Vault Primitives
description: Stat card, chip list, inline picker, dropdown, readiness panel, checklist, sticky action bar, subsection.

name: Tab Bar
description: Underline-style tab bar for router or signal-based tabs.

name: List Workflow
description: Typical page header + table pattern for browsable lists.

name: Detail Workflow
description: Typical back-link + meta-list pattern for entity detail pages.

name: Hybrid Edit
description: Inline edit for scalar fields; advanced edit for structured fields.

name: Expandable Rows
description: Whole-row trigger revealing inline context without leaving the table.

name: Side-Panel Inspector
description: Persistent inspector panel for richer detail and actions.

name: Loading States
description: Labelled loading spinner for async content.

name: Date & Time Pipes
description: datetime and relativeTime pipes for ISO string formatting.
